panels.description: 30-day SLO tracking for multichain sign requests completed in time

targets.expr:
label_replace(
  (sum by(version) (increase(multichain_sign_requests_success{environment=~"$environment"}[30d])) / (sum by(version) (increase(multichain_sign_requests_success{environment=~"$environment"}[30d])) + sum by(version) (increase(multichain_sign_requests_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[30d])))) * 100,
  "version", "No version:", "version", "^$"
)

panels.title: In-time Requests SLI (monthly)
